response: A 45-year-old female patient has a BMI of 27.3, which falls in the overweight category, and her blood pressure reading of 138/88 indicates stage 1 hypertension. Her cholesterol level is elevated at 225 mg/dL, her fasting glucose is borderline high at 110 mg/dL, and she has a family history of diabetes through her mother. While she is a non-smoker, her exercise frequency of twice per week may need improvement to help manage her cardiovascular risk factors.
